signals.headline: Solana (SOL) Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Progress | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana (SOL) Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Progress | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This milestone, confirmed as of April 14, 2026, marks an 8.2% increase in Q1 2026 and a 12% rise since October 2025, ranking SOL as the fourth-largest held L1 token behind BNB, ETH, and TRX—signaling robust holder accumulation despite a 63% price drawdown from $224 to $84.[1][3]
